name: Moneyhub
description: Open banking and open finance API platform for UK data aggregation and payment initiation.

seo.title: Moneyhub — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Moneyhub: Open banking and open finance API platform for UK data aggregation and payment initiation.

when_to_use: UK open banking data aggregation for personal finance apps
PSD2-compliant payment initiation across UK and EU banks
Financial data enrichment and categorization for fintechs
Pension and investment data aggregation for wealth platforms
Bank account connectivity for UK employer financial wellness

pros: UK open banking coverage is solid
Also supports open finance, not just accounts
Category enrichment for PFM and lending
cons: Competes with Plaid, Tink, TrueLayer locally
review.verdict: Respectable UK open finance platform, though Plaid and Tink usually win on developer experience.
review.best_for: UK fintechs needing open banking plus open finance data together
review.not_for: Teams outside UK or startups wanting quick self-serve signup

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
